title: senecio macranthus
intro: Senecio macranthus is a plant species, also known as the large-flowered Jacob's ladder, which belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which contain sesquiterpene lactones with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Senecio macranthus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress, among other potential benefits. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
